macro_markets.query: What are the most important macroeconomic and stock market news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major index movements, Fed/central bank news, and significant company earnings or announcements.

crypto_news.query: What are the most significant cryptocurrency and blockchain news from the past 24 hours? Include major price movements, regulatory news, and notable project developments.

items.title: Bitcoin Surges Past $78,000 on Iran Truce Extension and Institutional Demand
items.summary: Bitcoin jumped 2.7% to $78,018, peaking at $78,430 amid U.S. President Trump's ceasefire extension with Iran and strong institutional buying. MicroStrategy acquired 34,164 BTC for $2.5 billion, boosting its holdings to 815,000 coins.

items.title: Crypto Market Sees $420 Million in Liquidations, Mostly Shorts as Bitcoin Rallies
items.summary: Over $415 million in crypto futures positions were liquidated in the past 24 hours, with $285 million in shorts (70%) wiped out amid Bitcoin's rise above $78,000. More than 100,000 traders affected as prices surged.

items.title: Ethereum Climbs 3.2% to $2,391 as Spot ETFs Record Ninth Straight Day of Inflows
items.summary: Ethereum rose 3.2% to $2,391.53, supported by $43.36 million inflows into U.S. spot Ether ETFs for the ninth consecutive day. Altcoins like XRP (+1.3%), Solana, Cardano, and Polygon (+2.5% each) also gained.

items.title: Meme Coins Surge with MemeCore Up 24-30%, Sector Gains 4.81%
items.summary: The meme coin sector rose 4.81% in 24 hours, led by MemeCore (+24.04% to $4.19, or +30.41% in some reports) and Dogecoin (+2.3%). RaveDAO led gainers with +142.69%.

items.title: Cardano (ADA) Eyes Breakout as Bitcoin Hits $78K in Broader Crypto Rally
items.summary: Cardano positions for a breakout amid a bullish market where Bitcoin tapped $78,000 resistance and Ether advanced, with the overall crypto market showing strong momentum over the past 24 hours.

ai_news.query: What are the most important artificial intelligence and machine learning news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include new model releases, company announcements, research breakthroughs, and industry trends.

items.title: OpenAI Rolls Out ChatGPT Images 2.0 with Realistic Visuals and Improved Text Rendering
items.summary: OpenAI has launched ChatGPT Images 2.0, featuring enhanced realistic visuals and better text rendering capabilities. This update aims to improve image generation quality for users.

items.title: Nvidia's Strong Forecast Calms AI Bubble Jitters, Shares Jump 5%
items.summary: Nvidia reported a strong forecast that eased concerns over an AI bubble, with shares rising 5% in extended trading and poised to add $220 billion in market value. The company has seen a 1,200% surge in shares over the past three years.

items.title: Brookfield Launches $100 Billion AI Infrastructure Program
items.summary: Brookfield announced a $100 billion AI infrastructure initiative, anchored by a new Artificial Intelligence Infrastructure Fund targeting $10 billion in equity commitments. The fund launched on Wednesday to support AI data center growth.

items.title: AMD, Cisco, and Saudi's Humain Launch AI Joint Venture with 100-Megawatt Data Center
items.summary: AMD, Cisco, and Humain formed a joint venture to build a 100-megawatt data center in Saudi Arabia, securing Luma AI as its first major customer for generative video computing. This marks a significant expansion in regional AI infrastructure.

items.title: Nvidia and Menlo Micro Collaborate to Speed Up AI Chip Testing by 30-90%
items.summary: Nvidia partnered with Menlo Micro on new switching chips that accelerate AI chip testing by 30–90%, addressing production bottlenecks amid surging demand. The micro-metal switches upgrade existing test boards for better performance.

items.title: Connecticut Senate Passes Amended Comprehensive AI Regulation Bill
items.summary: The Connecticut Senate approved an amended AI bill (Senate Bill 5) by a 32-4 vote, regulating frontier AI models, creating a state AI sandbox, and addressing youth social media and chatbot use. The bill now advances to the House after extensive debate.

items.title: AI Lab Standalone Releases: 9 AI Image Models in One Desktop App
items.summary: Picture Instruments launched AI Lab Standalone, a native app for Windows and macOS integrating nine AI image models including Nano Banana series, GPT Image 1.5, Flux 1/2, and Seedream 4/4.5 into a single workspace, eliminating browser tab juggling.

gaming.query: What are the most notable video game and gaming industry news from the past 24 hours? Include game releases, announcements, esports, and industry developments.

items.title: ARC Raiders Extends Expedition Window and Reveals Damage Requirements
items.summary: Developers have extended the ARC Raiders expedition window to April 28th to May 11th, 2026, and revealed damage requirements following player criticism.

items.title: Crimson Desert Map Expansion Appears Likely with Out-of-Bounds Exploration
items.summary: Pearl Abyss has developed extensive lands beyond Crimson Desert's borders, suggesting potential future map expansions, as shown in out-of-bounds videos and Reddit posts.

items.title: Silent Hill 2 VR Mod Receives Major Update with Full Body and New Controls
items.summary: The Silent Hill 2 VR mod now features a full animated body, improved controls for dodging, and enhanced performance when paired with the Ultra Plus mod.

items.title: World of Warcraft Discipline Priest Returns to Shielding Builds in Patch 12.05
items.summary: The War Within Patch 12.05 shifts Discipline Priest toward heavy shielding and bubbling playstyles in raids and Mythic+, reviving disc shields.

items.title: World of Tanks Offers New Rewards for Returning Players
items.summary: World of Tanks introduces rewards for players inactive for 60 days, alongside updates like the Index Feature and Free-to-Play challenge episodes.

tech_news.query: What are the most important technology news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major product launches, company news, and significant tech industry developments. Exclude AI-specific news.

items.title: SpaceX Partners with Cursor, Option to Acquire for $60B
items.summary: SpaceX announced a partnership with AI coding company Cursor with an option to acquire the startup for $60 billion later this year, as the rocket maker prepares for a public offering.

items.title: Samsung Researcher Sentenced for Leaking Semiconductor Technology to China
items.summary: A South Korean court sentenced a former Samsung researcher to seven years in prison for leaking semiconductor technology to China's CXMT, assisting in the development of HBM chips.

items.title: Tim Cook Steps Down as Apple CEO in September
items.summary: Apple's former CEO Tim Cook is set to step down from his position in September, with the company planning a smooth transition.

items.title: Anker Announces Thus Compute-in-Memory Chip for On-Device Processing
items.summary: Anker unveiled the Thus chip designed to bring on-device computing capabilities to its products, with initial rollout planned for upcoming Soundcore earbuds.

items.title: Two Navy Aircraft Crash in South China Sea
items.summary: Two Navy aircraft crashed within 30 minutes in the South China Sea in a significant incident.
